name: obsidian-tools
description: Obsidian skills and vault filesystem MCP access for personal note workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Obsidian skills and vault filesystem access.
interface.longDescription: Obsidian Tools packages Obsidian CLI, Markdown, Bases, JSON Canvas skills, and a filesystem MCP server pointed at the configured Obsidian vault.
defaultPrompt: Work with my Obsidian vault notes and canvases.
